transcription.text: Misty, new portable hair dryer from Proctor Silex. Light, goes anywhere, dries quick like a hard top, fits comfortably even over curlers. No strings, so there's no tightness, no marks. Four heat selections, beauty mist for better sets and quick touch-ups. Misty Happening by Proctor Silex.

segments.text: Misty, new portable hair dryer from Proctor Silex.
